title: dosage_blocks
description: Per-candidate dosage-signal core block and extension breakpoints. Produced by 01_dosage_signal.R via marker correlation (core block) and per-marker correlation walk outward from the core (extension). One of the per-method sources consumed by 03_consensus_merge when it computes the refined consensus breakpoint. The 'ext_left_bp' and 'ext_right_bp' fields are the block-extension breakpoint estimates (weight 2.0 in the consensus).
question: Q3

status.description: ok = all four steps succeeded; other values indicate which step aborted.

ext_left_bp.description: Block-extension LEFT breakpoint estimate (bp). Per-method source for 03_consensus_merge, method='block_extension', weight=2.0.

ext_right_bp.description: Block-extension RIGHT breakpoint estimate (bp). Per-method source for 03_consensus_merge.

delta_min.description: Parameter used; informative if |h2_mean - h1_mean| >= delta_min.

rho_block.description: Parameter used; min marker-marker |cor| for core-block adjacency.

rho_ext.description: Parameter used; min |cor| to extend past core-block edge.

markers_tsv_path.description: Path to the per-marker TSV under evidence_registry/.../raw/
